final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for an automotive brand launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, high-impact visual aesthetic with a sense of translucency and depth — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide landscape cover layout with title and subtitle prominently placed
Subject: must include the 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop that feels expansive and brand-premium — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a striking, awe-inspiring atmosphere with a sense of translucency and visual depth — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with automotive brand prestige — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, high-end surface quality — exact material treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title), "9月上市" (subtitle)
Constraints: must preserve legibility of title and subtitle against the background
Avoid:
